sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁתה

Transliteration: shâthâh

Phonetic: shaw-thaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to drink
    1. (Qal)
      1. to drink
        1. of drinking cup of God's wrath, of slaughter, of wicked deeds (figuratively)
      2. to feast
    2. (Niphal) to be drunk

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2477

Part(s) of speech: Verb
